data.title: FDA approves HemoSonics' Quantra Hemostasis System for obstetric use, expanding its 510(k) clearance.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, HemoSonics has received 510(k) clearance from the FDA to broaden the application of its Quantra Hemostasis System to obstetric procedures. This approval signifies a significant expansion for the company, allowing them to cater to a larger demographic of patients. The Quantra system is renowned for its effectiveness in managing blood clotting during medical procedures and has already made a positive impact in various healthcare settings. This decision opens up new possibilities for HemoSonics and marks a pivotal moment in their journey, with the potential to impact a substantial number of individuals undergoing childbirth procedures.

data.title: Clean Harbors to offer $845 million in senior notes, expected to mature in 2033, plus $1,160 million in secured term loan.
data.description: In NORWELL, Mass., Clean Harbors, Inc. (NYSE: CLH) has revealed plans to begin a private offering of $845 million in senior notes expected to mature by 2033. The company also aims to obtain $1,160.0 million in borrowings through a new secured term loan credit facility alongside the notes offering. The proceeds from these initiatives will support Clean Harbors' financial endeavors.

data.title: SHOPLINE partners with Alloy Automation to integrate ShipStation, saving merchants 1,500+ hours and nearly $40K per year.
data.description: Los Angeles, Sept. 25, 2025 - Merchants are experiencing significant savings since adopting the new ShipStation integration, cutting down over 1,500 hours and saving nearly $40,000 annually. This partnership between SHOPLINE and Alloy Automation aims to streamline commerce operations for merchants, leading to increased efficiency and cost-effectiveness in their businesses.

data.title: Scrum Alliance appoints Dean Hanson as Chief Growth Officer to drive enterprise sales growth and channel partnerships.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Denver, Dean Hanson was appointed as the Chief Growth Officer by Scrum Alliance. The organization made this announcement as part of its efforts to enhance its sales operation, reinforce channel partnerships, and expedite growth in the enterprise sector. Hanson's addition to the executive team signifies a strategic move to ramp up the company's market presence and drive expansion.

data.title: TUSK Practice Sales in Charlotte provides tips for med spa owners to maximize valuation during a practice sale.
data.description: TUSK Practice Sales recently offered insights on capitalizing on increasing demand for medical spa practices, especially from private equity firms. The discussion, held in Charlotte on September 25, 2025, highlighted the importance of leveraging current market trends to secure a successful sale. With interest in the sector on the rise, medical spa owners need to grasp the dynamics at play and strategize accordingly. By adopting a proactive approach and being aware of the growing interest from investors, owners can maximize their chances of a high-confidence sale.

data.title: News7Health endorses HSL LABS' Healing Acceleration Formula™ for Innovation in Plastic Surgery Recovery.
data.description: In a press release dated September 25, 2025, News7Health, a prominent digital publication specializing in healthcare and medical breakthroughs, officially endorsed HSL LABS' revolutionary Healing Acceleration Formula™ as the Product Innovation of the Year. This prestigious recognition underscores the remarkable impact of HSL LABS' groundbreaking product in the industry.

data.title: Floor & Decor opens new Gastonia store at 4210 East Franklin Rd, NC. 35 full-time, 15 part-time employees led by Jesse Tooper.
data.description: In Gastonia, North Carolina, Floor & Decor (NYSE: FND) has launched a new warehouse store at 4210 East Franklin Rd. The store features a design center and has around 35 full-time and 15 part-time employees. Jesse Tooper heads the team as the Chief Executive Merchant. Floor & Decor is known for specializing in hard-surface flooring for both homeowners and professionals.

data.title: Revision Skincare appoints Lisa Paley as CEO to drive company growth.
data.description: Irving, TX - Revision Skincare®, an innovative skincare company, has named Lisa Paley as its new CEO.

data.title: Liberty Puerto Rico secures $250M loan through subsidiary, $200M drawn, $50M available, fixed 9.75% coupon, matures in 2030.
data.description: In Denver, Colorado, Liberty Latin America Ltd. (NASDAQ: LILA and LILAK, OTC Link: LILAB) revealed that Liberty Puerto Rico has secured a new five-year $250 million financing. Of this amount, $200 million has already been utilized, while $50 million remains accessible over the upcoming year. The financing, maturing in 2030, carries a fixed interest rate of 9.75% annually. The collateral for this facility comprises specific fixed assets.

data.title: Deepgram gains AWS Generative AI Competency, enhancing service tools. Regulations met through technical audit.
data.description: In San Francisco, Deepgram, a notable Voice AI platform, revealed today that it has secured the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Generative AI Competency. This notable achievement positions Deepgram as a distinguished AWS Partner facilitating customers and the AWS Partner Network (APN) in propelling services, tools, and infrastructure necessary for the adoption of generative AI technologies. The attainment of the AWS Generative AI Competency entails undergoing a stringent technical audit.

data.title: ECI introduces AI Assist for MobileTech, aiding office tech industry. Boosts efficiency with faster issue resolution.
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas, ECI Software Solutions revealed the early access launch of AI Assist for MobileTech. This AI-powered service call resolution solution, tailored for the office technology sector, is integrated within the MobileTech mobile app. By utilizing AI Assist, service organizations can swiftly and precisely address equipment problems at a reduced cost. This innovation aims to tackle major challenges, offering a faster resolution process and enhanced accuracy for resolving issues in the industry.

data.title: AllegroDVT releases tools for AV2 adoption, supporting AOMedia's codec for 2025 release; boosts AR/VR support.
data.description: In Grenoble, France, AllegroDVT, a top provider of Digital Video Technology Solutions, has unveiled a new suite of products to speed up the uptake of the upcoming AV2 codec from the Alliance for Open Media (AOMedia). This AV2 Codec, scheduled to launch by the end of 2025 according to AOMedia's announcement on September 15th, is a significant advancement in video compression capabilities. It is expected to offer improved backing for AR/VR applications and a range of other features.

data.title: DDC Enterprise buys 50 BTC, totals 1,058 BTC in treasury strategy. Market sentiment remains cautious.
data.description: DDC Enterprise Limited, a key player in corporate Bitcoin treasury strategy and global Asian food platform, revealed the addition of 50 BTC to its holdings, elevating the total to 1,058 BTC. Amid cautious market sentiment, the company persists in its ongoing Bitcoin accumulation strategy. With a dedication to responsibly expanding its reserves, DDC maintains its pursuit of establishing a substantial corporate presence in the crypto space.
